arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest set their sights on signing 'monster' player
Pep Guardiola responds to Liverpool boss Arne Slot's '115 charges' joke
arts.sum: Arne Slot made a joke about the 115 charges Manchester City are facing, which could result in relegation, after his Liverpool side moved 11 points clear at the top of the Premier League

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Man City in race for Frimpong
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester City appear set to compete for the signature of Bayer Leverkusen's Jeremie Frimpong, while Manchester United have identified RB Leipzig's David Raum as a potential solution for manager Ruben Amorim at left-back. - Liverpool have identified Bayer Leverkusen right-back Jeremie Frimpong as their No. 1 potential replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold, according to TeamTalk .

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola responds to rumours of Kevin De Bruyne rift
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola responds to rumours of a rift with Man City star Kevin De Bruyne.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah backs Kyle Walker to overcome Man City nightmare amid Pep Guardiola decision
arts.sum: Kyle Walker has struggled for Manchester City this season, particularly in his most recent outing against Liverpool

arts.ttl: Manchester City will allow striker to seal transfer to Arsenal, Chelsea or Tottenham
arts.sum: Manchester City are not expected to stand in the way of clubs trying to sign Liam Delap from Ipswich Town in the near future. The talented young English forward had a spell at Man City earlier in his career, but didn’t get much playing time before going out on several loan spells. arts.ttl: “He will certainly remain” – Manchester City face January transfer fight as president talks big
arts.sum: On Monday, we covered claims from Italy which stated Manchester City plan to make a ‘maxi offer’ of €35m to sign Torino’s Samuele Ricci in January. It was also reported Pep Guardiola is ‘ready to steal’ the midfielder from AC Milan’s clutches.
